info.description: Backend API for ASSMI Super Shop ERP.
info.title: ASSMI Super Shop ERP API

get.description: Get transition delete history with optional filters

post.description: Create a new record of a deleted transaction

delete.description: Delete a record from the transaction history log

post.description: Authenticates user and returns access and refresh tokens

get.description: Get a list of all available permissions

post.description: Issues a new access token and refresh token from a valid refresh token

get.description: Get all responsibility transfers with optional filters

post.description: Create a new responsibility transfer request

get.description: Get a responsibility transfer by ID

post.description: Approve or reject a responsibility transfer request

get.description: Get a list of all roles

post.description: Create a new role with optional permissions

get.description: Get details of a role by its ID

delete.description: Delete a role by its ID

get.description: Returns a list of all users with roles and permissions with pagination.

post.description: Registers a new user and returns access and refresh tokens

get.description: Returns current authenticated user
Returns a single user by ID with roles and permissions

put.description: Updates user details and employee information. Password change forces logout.

delete.description: Deletes a user and revokes all tokens. Superadmins cannot be deleted.

get.description: Get all wallets
Get wallet by ID
Returns service health status

post.summary: Create a new partner sub group

get.summary: Get partner sub group by ID
List all categories with full hierarchy (Department>Category>SubCategory>MinorCategory)
Get category by ID with full hierarchy (Department>Category>SubCategory>MinorCategory)

get.description: Retrieves all items with optional pagination and sorting

post.description: Creates a new item with all required fields

get.description: Retrieves a single item by its ID
get.summary: Get a specific item by ID

delete.description: Soft deletes an item by its ID

patch.description: Updates an existing item with provided fields

post.summary: Create a new sales supply type

get.summary: Get sales supply type by ID

post.summary: Create a new sales tax setup

get.summary: Get sales tax setup by ID

post.summary: Create a GRN (saved as Pending, call /approve to confirm and update stock)

patch.summary: Approve a PENDING GRN (confirms receipt and updates location_stocks)

post.description: Create inventory type with required and optional fields

delete.description: Soft delete an inventory type by ID

patch.description: Update inventory type fields (type_code, type_name, description, is_active)

post.description: Create location with required and optional fields
post.summary: Create a new location || create root location (without parent  "parent_id": null,)
Create a purchase order  then type selected REQUISITION_BASED("po_date": "2026-05-02","order_type": "REQUISITION_BASED","requisition_id": 4,"office_id": 1,"location_id": 9,"supplier_id": 4)

get.summary: List ORDERED requisitions with their linked PO ID

get.description: Retrieves projects with pagination and filters

post.description: Creates a new project in the system

put.description: Changes the status of a project

delete.summary: Delete a requisition (pending or CANCELLED only)

patch.summary: Update a requisition (Pending status only-- when item update then must be item_id is required)

patch.description: Validates allowed transitions and records status history.

get.description: Get all files uploaded by the user with pagination

post.description: Upload a single file to a specific folder or root

get.description: Search files by name with pagination
Get detailed information about a specific file
Download a file

post.description: Move a file to a different folder

get.description: View or stream a file directly (inline display for images/PDFs)
Get all root folders (folders without parent) for the user with their child folders nested

post.description: Create a new folder in the specified parent or root
post.summary: Create a new folder No need parent id if you want to create root folder

get.description: Get subfolders and files in a folder with pagination. If no folder_id is provided, returns root folder contents.

delete.description: Soft delete a folder and its contents

get.description: Get subfolders and files in a folder with pagination. If no folder_id is provided, returns root folder contents.

pharmacy.description: Pharmacy Fields (required if IsPharmacy is true)

items.description: Items: required for DIRECT/CONTRACT, auto-populated from requisition for REQUISITION_BASED
------ Items update CAN be update but no optional---

is_active.description: Use pointer to handle boolean false in binding
